title: picea abies var. alpestris
intro: Picea abies var. alpestris, also known as mountain spruce, is a subspecies of the Norway spruce (Picea abies) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Picea abies var. alpestris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Picea abies var. alpestris can be made into teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections and promote overall well-being.
